creator: grant_watson@yahoo.com
text:
Per a suggestion on the other tracker, I tried running truss on sh under xt=
erm. That suppressed the bug, but running truss on xterm itself didn't.=A0 =
That confirmed that xterm sends SIGWINCH and immediately receives SIGCHLD, =
which strengthens the case that this is a bug in sh.=0A=0AI tried reproduci=
ng the problem from ports/178194, which I realized also involved sh dying w=
hen resized.=A0 I was able to successfully reproduce that problem while run=
ning truss; I got a potentially more useful log there, though my syscall-fu=
 is not strong enough to read it.=0A=0AWhat's the best way to proceed?=A0 I=
 can open a new PR if that's best or post the truss logs here if someone te=
lls me how.
